name: Meowju Harness Registry
description: Single Source of Truth mapping to prevent architectural drift.

rules: Before creating a new component, check if a related 'Source of Truth' exists in this registry.
Do not implement redundant business logic; import from the defined SSoT path.
Update this registry whenever a new primary domain is established.
